stemHtml: The stall warning speed is different from the actual stalling speed of the aeroplane because the…

options.a: crew must be warned just after the actual stall to allow stall recovery.
options.b: actual stalling speed can NOT be determined with enough precision.
options.c: stall warning speed can NOT be determined with enough precision.
options.d: crew must be warned just before the actual stall to allow stall prevention.
